query:
-- Manual named_unverified: email and linkedin coverage
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasEmail,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noEmail,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedin IS NOT NULL AND linkedin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasLinkedin,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual' AND contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified';
